title: Roomio Furniture Detection — Result Contract
description: Shape of the <id>.result.json files Agent B writes to shared/results/. This is a PUBLISHED API: Agent B will not change its shape without announcing in roomio.txt first and waiting for Agent A to acknowledge. Detection is suggestion-only — Agent A renders these as confirmable dropdowns; nothing is auto-added. Every proposal.archetype_id is guaranteed to be a valid id from shared/archetypes.json (uncertain items fall back to misc-box). additionalProperties is true everywhere so future additive fields never break Agent A's validation.

request_file.description: Agent A drops a room photo at shared/requests/<id>.<ext> (jpg/jpeg/png/webp). An optional sidecar shared/requests/<id>.request.json may carry {"request_id": "<id>", "image_path": "shared/requests/<id>.jpg"}; if absent, request_id is derived from the image filename stem. The watcher tolerates either.

version.description: Contract version. Bumped only via a roomio.txt announcement + Agent A ack.

status.description: 'error' still yields a valid file with proposals:[] and a human-readable error — never a crash on Agent A's side.

proposals.description: One entry per detected furniture region. May be empty (nothing detected / error).

archetype_id.description: GUARANTEED to exist in shared/archetypes.json. 'misc-box' when uncertain.

display_label.description: Human label for the archetype, e.g. '3-Seater Sofa'. Mirror of archetypes.json name.

detected_label.description: Raw coarse label from the detector before closed-set mapping, e.g. 'sofa', 'couch'. Informational only.

confidence.description: Combined detector+classifier confidence in [0,1]. Low values typically map to misc-box.

bbox.description: Pixel [x, y, w, h], top-left origin, in the source image's coordinate space (see image.width/height). Normalize by dividing x,w by width and y,h by height.
